series.title: Lord of Spirits
series.description: Fr. Andrew Stephen Damick and Fr. Stephen De Young explore the angelic and spiritual world as understood by the early Church and the Orthodox Tradition.

series.title: Inquirer Essentials
series.description: Foundational teachings for those exploring the Orthodox Faith, from the sign of the cross to the meaning of confession and icons.

series.title: Sunday Homilies
series.description: Recorded sermons from Fr. Solomon Longo, delivered during the Sunday Divine Liturgy at Saints Peter and Paul Cathedral.

series.title: Liturgical Music
series.description: Recordings of Orthodox hymns, troparia, and choral works sung by the choir of Saints Peter and Paul Cathedral.

videos.title: Lord of Spirits: The Opened Heavens
videos.description: The first episode of Lord of Spirits, exploring the heavenly realm and its relationship to the earthly Church.

videos.title: Lord of Spirits: The Fallen
videos.description: Exploring the fall of the angelic powers and what the Orthodox tradition teaches about the origin of evil.

videos.title: Lord of Spirits: The Divine Name
videos.description: The significance of the divine name in Scripture and the Orthodox understanding of God's self-revelation.

videos.title: Lord of Spirits: The Watchers
videos.description: The tradition of the Watchers in Jewish and Christian literature and what the Fathers say about angelic guardianship.

videos.title: Lord of Spirits: Giants in the Land
videos.description: The Nephilim, the giants, and how the early Church read Genesis 6 through the lens of the spiritual world.

videos.title: The Symbolic World
videos.description: The symbolic and typological language of Orthodox iconography, liturgy, and scripture.

videos.title: Theology of Icons
videos.description: An introduction to the theology and meaning of Orthodox iconography.

videos.title: Race and Becoming Orthodox
videos.description: Fr. Moses Berry speaks about his experience of conversion and the place of African-American history in the Church.

videos.title: 5 Thoughts on Confession
videos.description: A practical and theological introduction to the Mystery of Repentance in the Orthodox Church.

videos.title: Making the Sign of the Cross
videos.description: An introduction to this foundational gesture of Orthodox Christian prayer and worship.

videos.title: Why Does the Church Use Incense?
videos.description: The theological and sensory meaning of incense in Orthodox Christian worship.

videos.title: Monks and Monasticism
videos.description: Understanding the monastic calling in the Orthodox Church and its relationship to wider parish life.

videos.title: A History of Christianity
videos.description: A documentary overview of Christian history, including the Orthodox tradition through the centuries.
